attributes.description: Network and authentication detail for Identity Protection timeline events.

params.markdown:
## Identity Protection network overview

This dashboard supplements the IDP timeline overview with network and authentication detail from the `crowdstrike.identity_protection_timeline` data stream.

Use these panels to analyze protocol mix, subnet labels (network tag), ISP classification, authentication mechanisms, services accessed, target service types, Active Directory sites, SAM accounts, and target endpoints. The same dashboard controls apply as on the overview. Use the **IDP timeline overview** link to return to the overview.

attributes.title: [Logs CrowdStrike] IDP timeline network
